persona.name: Sara
persona.description: Non-technical clinic administrator who needs forms for patient intake. No programming or database experience. Uses Google Forms occasionally.

initialIntent:
## Purpose
Collect intake information from new fitness coaching clients including their health history, fitness goals, and availability.

## Audience
New clients signing up for personal training or group fitness coaching.

## Exclusions
Do not collect detailed medical records — only relevant health conditions that affect exercise safety.

opinions.text: Would you like to include a field for clients to specify their preferred training format (e.g., one-on-one, group classes)?
Should we add a field for clients to indicate their current fitness level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced)?
Would it be beneficial to include a question about clients' preferred communication methods (e.g., email, phone, text)?
Should we provide an option for clients to share any specific concerns or questions they have before starting training?
Would it be useful to include a field for clients to set a target date for achieving their fitness goals?

schemaDescription: 9 fields: Full Name, Age, Gender, Email Address, Relevant Health Conditions, Fitness Goals, Previous Exercise Experience, Preferred Days for Training, Preferred Times for Training
provenanceSummary: Schema generated once. 5 opinion resolutions recorded. 6 total provenance entries.
